channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: “Rewriting the blueprint, not removing bricks”: Multiverse Computing says it can shrink large AI models and cut memory use in half
item.description: Multiverse launches compressed OpenAI language model designed to cut memory needs and lower AI infrastructure costs.

item.title: Trump Lashes Out at Banks Over Contentious Crypto Bill
item.description: “The Genius Act is being threatened and undermined by the Banks, and that is unacceptable — We are not going to allow it,” the president wrote.

item.title: Apple’s new Studio Display is missing a key feature that will leave Mac gamers disappointed
item.description: Apple’s new Studio Display comes without a 120Hz refresh rate, making it a poor choice for Mac gamers.

item.title: This Giant Star Just Switched Colors—and It Might Be About to Blow
item.description: Astronomers watched as the supergiant WOH G64 reshaped itself into a different type of star.

item.title: Why AI startups are selling the same equity at two different prices
item.description: Some AI founders are using a novel valuation mechanism to manufacture unicorn status.
